paper: Rotemberg et al. 2021 / SIIM-ISIC 2020 Kaggle challenge

expected_verdict.failure_class: Duplicate-image leakage (exact-hash duplicates span train/test folds)
expected_verdict.root_cause_summary: 525 exact-duplicate rows (same image_hash) in the dataset; prepare_data.py calls train_test_split without prior deduplication, so duplicates appear in both folds and Random Forest memorizes them.

expected_fix.shape_of_fix: Add `df = df.drop_duplicates(subset=['image_hash'], keep='first').reset_index(drop=True)` BEFORE train_test_split is called.

acceptance_checks: Agent identifies duplicate-image leakage as rank 1 hypothesis within 30s
Agent runs at least one tool call that counts unique image_hash values
After fix, agent reports metric_delta where AUC_RF drops by at least 0.04
Fix is a single-line drop_duplicates addition (not a wholesale refactor)
Dossier's 'remaining_uncertainty' section acknowledges perceptual-duplicate and patient-level leakage as unaddressed follow-ups
